title: Implement real buy/sell order placement and cancellation via ICDex in the grid trading loop

requirements.text: In the backend actor (backend/main.mo), implement the core grid trading loop that places real buy and sell orders via ICDex. For each cycle: (1) query current mid-price from ICDex, (2) calculate grid levels based on configured spread, numOrders, and orderSize, (3) cancel any existing open bot orders that are no longer aligned with the new grid (using the ICDex cancel endpoint), (4) place new buy orders below mid-price and sell orders above mid-price using the ICDex trade/order placement endpoint, (5) store placed order IDs in the open orders map, and (6) log each placed and cancelled order to the activity log. The loop must be driven by the existing recurring timer.

quotes: colocar ordens reais de compra/venda via ICDex
Loop de trading grid — colocar ordens reais de compra/venda via ICDex com cancelamento e reposicionamento correto

acceptanceCriteria: The timer-based bot loop calls the ICDex order placement API to place real buy and sell limit orders at each grid level.
Orders that deviate from the current grid are cancelled via ICDex cancel API before new orders are placed.
Placed order IDs are persisted in the open orders stable map.
Each order placement and cancellation is recorded as a LogEntry in the activity log.
The number of open orders does not exceed maxOpenOrders config.
The loop only runs when the bot is enabled.

requirements.text: In the backend actor (backend/main.mo), implement a `pending` query method that returns all currently open orders tracked by the bot by reading from the open orders map. Replace any existing incorrect calls to retrieve open orders with this method.

quotes: Método `pending` — consultar ordens abertas do bot (substituindo qualquer chamada incorreta)

acceptanceCriteria: A `pending` query function exists in the backend actor.
It returns a list/array of open order records from the internal open orders map.
Any prior incorrect open-order query calls elsewhere in the actor are replaced with the correct map lookup.

requirements.text: Update the frontend `useQueries.ts` hook to call the backend `pending` method for fetching open orders, replacing any previous incorrect query. Ensure the OpenOrdersPanel continues to display the live list of open bot orders correctly.

quotes: Método `pending` — consultar ordens abertas do bot

acceptanceCriteria: The React Query hook for open orders calls the `pending` backend method.
The OpenOrdersPanel renders the returned open orders without errors.
Loading, error, and empty states are handled correctly.

constraints: All Motoko logic must remain in the single actor in backend/main.mo.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
ICDex integration must use the existing ICDex canister interface already referenced in the project; do not introduce new external dependencies.
nonGoals: Order history / latestFilled display in the dashboard (separate task).
Manual order placement and cancellation buttons in the dashboard (separate task).
Balance verification before each bot cycle (separate task).
